mnemonics: PRECISE: Precision, Recall, Evaluation, Categorization, Indexing, Search Engines. Aids in remembering the core components of evaluation metrics and their purpose.
keyPoints: Precision measures the fraction of retrieved documents that are relevant.
Recall measures the fraction of relevant documents that are retrieved.
The F-measure (F1 Score) is the harmonic mean of Precision and Recall, providing a single score that balances both.
commonMistakes: Confusing Precision (correctness of results) with Recall (completeness of results).
Assuming a high Precision score automatically means a high Recall score, which is not necessarily true.
